params.name: Fire Chalice
params.description:
On Sep 7, 30,200 BC, Prometheus gave fire to humans with this Holy Grail.
That day, Prometheus managed to steal fire from heaven and bring it to humanity. His cylindrical torch was covered with a special metal and held the gods' fire. No matter how strong the wind and rain are, they cannot extinguish it. In a rage, Zeus took Prometheus to the Caucasus and bound him to a steep cliff with an unbreakable chain so that he could never sleep. An eagle pecked Prometheus' liver every day until Heracl …
